reviews.comment:
Pasé a las 7 am y no tenían medialunas para acompañar el café, me atendieron con poco interés, supongo que todos podemos tener un mal día, por lo demás es un shop muy bien surtido, no es Full, es Aca, no esperen canjear puntos serviclub.

(Translated by Google)
I went by at 7 am and they didn't have croissants to go with the coffee. I was served with little interest; I suppose we can all have a bad day. Otherwise, it's a very well-stocked shop. It's not Full, it's Aca, so don't expect to redeem Serviclub points.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR4MzdPMFJBEAE
